description: A living encyclopedia of your story world — characters, settings, themes, factions, and lore, linked into one graph an agent grows and guards as you write.

folders.name: Characters
folders.description: People, creatures, viewpoint voices, and recurring named entities in the story world.

folders.name: Settings
folders.description: Places, routes, regions, rooms, realms, and atmospheric locations where scenes unfold.

folders.name: Themes
folders.description: Recurring tensions, motifs, questions, and symbolic pressures that give the world meaning.

folders.name: Factions
folders.description: Political, social, criminal, magical, and religious groups with agendas and alliances.

folders.name: Lore
folders.description: History, mythology, cosmology, magic systems, and hard truths about how the world works.

templates.name: Character
templates.description: A canon page for a person, creature, or recurring voice.

templates.name: Setting
templates.description: A canon page for a place, route, region, or atmosphere-heavy location.

templates.name: Theme
templates.description: A page for a recurring tension, motif, or story question.

templates.name: Faction
templates.description: A generic faction page for groups with agendas and relationships.

templates.name: Political faction
templates.description: A faction page for parties, councils, states, houses, and political blocs.

templates.name: Religion
templates.description: A faction page for faiths, cults, temples, orders, and schisms.

templates.name: Lore
templates.description: A generic lore page for world truths, myths, and contested knowledge.

templates.name: Magic system
templates.description: A lore page for supernatural rules, costs, limits, and practitioners.

templates.name: Historical event
templates.description: A lore page for dated events, causes, consequences, and contested accounts.
